title: chrysanthemum maritimum
intro: Chrysanthemum maritimum, also known as sea chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant native to the coastal regions of China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral effects, making it beneficial for treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum maritimum include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and can also be used in capsule or powder form.
